evidence.description: All REQ-EPNS-001 through REQ-EPNS-012 have corresponding tests in pipeline.test.ts and step-level test files. Sprint 3 FIND-001 (PROP-EPNS-014 contradiction) resolved: spec, implementation, and tests now consistently show dirty-fail calls Clock.now() once.
PROP-EPNS-001 through PROP-EPNS-005 (required: true) all have dedicated harness tests. PROP-EPNS-006 through PROP-EPNS-017 and PROP-EPNS-019 are covered by pipeline.test.ts and step-level tests.
All classification edge cases covered: idle, empty, whitespace, dirty, save-failed with/without pending, saving/switching throws, null-note throws.

Integration tests cover all 7 paths: no-current, empty, dirty-success, dirty-fail, same-note, save-failed-retry-success, save-failed-retry-fail. Event ordering verified. Clock budget verified per path. FIND-003 (PROP-EPNS-018 gap) is minor/non-required.

All 9 calls to flushCurrentSession use 3 arguments instead of 4. The 4th parameter previousFrontmatter is omitted. Under strict TypeScript, this is a type error. At runtime it silently becomes undefined and is coerced to null.
Function signature requires 4 parameters: (decision, selectedNoteId, ports, previousFrontmatter). Implementation is correct; tests are calling incorrectly.
Pure core properly isolated. No port dependencies, no I/O. switch/case is exhaustive with saving/switching throw guards.
Clean orchestration: pre-guard, classify, flush, startNewSession. Port threading is explicit. getCurrentNoteId helper is minimal. FIND-002 is a minor type-safety gap in emit port typing.
PROP-EPNS-001: 1000-run property test with valid (state, note) pairs covering idle, editing, save-failed. Includes Date.now() spy check.
PROP-EPNS-003: 1000-run property test with separate empty/non-empty body arbitraries. Tests the production isEmpty function directly.
PROP-EPNS-004: 1000-run property test covering SaveFailedState with varied pendingNextNoteId and SaveError variants.
PROP-EPNS-005: Tier-0 compile-time exhaustiveness check verified. Also tested in pipeline.test.ts lines 53-63.

sprint3ResolutionStatus.FIND-001_propEpns014Contradiction: RESOLVED — PROP-EPNS-014 description updated to match spec (dirty-fail calls Clock once); spec, implementation, and tests are now consistent
sprint3ResolutionStatus.FIND-002_optionalPreviousFrontmatter: PARTIALLY_RESOLVED — The `?` was removed from flushCurrentSession parameter (line 42), but step2 tests still call with 3 arguments, omitting the now-required 4th parameter. New FIND-001 raised.
sprint3ResolutionStatus.FIND-003_clockBudgetSameNote: RESOLVED — same-note clock budget test added at pipeline.test.ts line 548-569
sprint3ResolutionStatus.FIND-004_clockBudgetDirtySuccess: RESOLVED — dirty-success clock budget test added at pipeline.test.ts line 572-594
sprint3ResolutionStatus.FIND-005_clockBudgetDirtyFail: RESOLVED — dirty-fail clock budget test at pipeline.test.ts line 518-545 and step2 line 221-241
sprint3ResolutionStatus.FIND-006_previousFrontmatterPassthrough: RESOLVED — test at pipeline.test.ts line 597-623 verifies blurSave receives previousFrontmatter from pipeline input
